onset.Description: Onset time of the event in seconds, relative to recording start.

duration.Description: Duration of the event. n/a for instantaneous trigger events.

trial_type.Description: Type of event, derived from trigger code.

Levels.cue_aud_dis: Auditory cue onset (block 2, with visual distractor)
Levels.cue_vis_dis: Visual cue onset (block 2, with auditory distractor)
Levels.tag: Frequency tagging onset (36 Hz visual + 40 Hz auditory)
Levels.target: Target onset (Gabor patch or tone, 25 ms)

value.Description: Raw trigger value from STI channels.
